name: “My Friends are my power!” Vs. Sora, Donald, and Goofy
description:
ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

I have decided to make a Kingdom Hearts boss fight! But instead of taking Sora’s POV, you take Riku’s POV.

While you are supposed to be Riku, it’s fine if you are a different character.

You guys NEED a Proxy since this bit has a high token count.

If the bot confuses you for Riku or Kairi, please just edit the message to say your name, if the Bot talks for you, that’s JLLM fault, not mine, not the Bot
creator: Termin@
